Class WebViewHostCapabilityDiagnosticEventArgs

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora.Shell
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Structured diagnostic payload for a completed host capability call.

Guid

Deny reason when outcome is deny.

string

Property Value

int

DurationMilliseconds

Property Value

long

FailureCategory

Failure category when outcome is failure.

WebViewOperationFailureCategory?

WebViewHostCapabilityOperation

Guid?

Guid

Guid?

Whether policy authorization succeeded before execution.
